name: WIRED Golf Club
about: Wired Golf Club is a PGA-certified indoor facility in Santa Monica, CA, featuring advanced golf simulators and practice bays. It caters to avid golfers seeking data-driven practice and realistic play, utilizing top-tier Trackman technology for both swing analysis and on-course simulation. The venue offers flexible hourly access and memberships, with a focus on a relaxed, tech-forward environment suitable for both solo practice and social play.
why_golfers_like_it: Industry-leading Trackman iO simulator for precise ball and club data
Ability to play over 400 world-class golf courses realistically
PGA Professionals with 20+ years of teaching experience
Data and video feedback after each shot
Comprehensive club fitting services with FITS technology

food_and_drink.notes: Catered food options available for events; mention of Clubhouse Lounge with downtime amenities
No mention of alcohol service; appears to be BYOB as not explicitly listed

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium indoor-optimized simulator using radar and infrared technology for ball/club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs, as the venue does not mention club rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Food options may be available for catering during events, but alcohol is not explicitly listed as served, suggesting BYOB may be allowed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A single round of golf can be completed in approximately 45 minutes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, the venue does not highlight kid-friendly features or activities, focusing instead on adult and serious golfers.
